subject: Re: dautoalign4warp not working
body:
Hi Giulia, 

Thanks for the report and sorry for the trouble! I’ll have a look into this tomorrow and report back - if possible, could you send me an offending tilt-series?

Cheers,

Alister 

> On 1 Jul 2021, at 12:55, Giulia Paris <paris.giulia@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> ﻿
> Hi all,
> 
> I’m experiencing some troubles running dautoalign4warp. It works for some tilt series, and it doesn’t work for others. When dautoalign4warp doesn’t work, I get a folder named Position_X.AWF containing the following:
> 
> 32K    configFiles
> 1.9G   detection
> 1.0K    info
> 80K     markersIntermediate
> 512    nominal.tlt
> 16K    workingMarkers.dms
> 
> After having a look at the log file in MATLAB, I spotted the warning messages attached. 
> 
> Finally, I have the following versions of:
> 
> -       IMOD 4.11.6
> 
> -       Dynamo 1.1.520
> 
> -       MATLAB 2020b
> 
> Does anyone know how I can solve this issue or have any suggestions?
> 
> Thank you very much! 
> 
> Best
> Giulia
> 
> --
